List all available bus routes

Source: R/stops.R
tm_bus_routes.Rd

List all available bus routes

Usage

tm_bus_routes()

Value

A sorted character vector of bus route IDs available for stop lookup.

Examples

tm_bus_routes()
#>   [1] "1"               "10"              "100"             "101"            
#>   [5] "104"             "104/109"         "105"             "106"            
#>   [9] "108"             "109"             "11"              "110"            
#>  [13] "111"             "112"             "114/116/117"     "116"            
#>  [17] "119"             "120"             "120/121"         "131/132"        
#>  [21] "134"             "136/137"         "14"              "15"             
#>  [25] "16"              "17/19"           "171"             "18"             
#>  [29] "201/202"         "21"              "210/211/212"     "214/216"        
#>  [33] "215"             "217/245"         "22"              "220/221/222"    
#>  [37] "225/226"         "23"              "230"             "236"            
#>  [41] "238"             "24/27/33"        "240"             "26"             
#>  [45] "28"              "29"              "30"              "31"             
#>  [49] "32"              "34"              "35"              "350/351"        
#>  [53] "354"             "36"              "37"              "38"             
#>  [57] "39"              "4"               "40/50"           "41"             
#>  [61] "411/430"         "42"              "424/450/456"     "426/428"        
#>  [65] "429"             "43"              "434/435/436"     "439/441/442"    
#>  [69] "44"              "45"              "451/465"         "455"            
#>  [73] "456"             "47"              "501/503"         "502/504"        
#>  [77] "505/553/554"     "51"              "52/59"           "55"             
#>  [81] "556/558"         "57"              "59"              "60/65"          
#>  [85] "61/70/170"       "62/76"           "64/68"           "66"             
#>  [89] "67/79"           "69"              "7"               "71"             
#>  [93] "712/713"         "72/74/75"        "73"              "77"             
#>  [97] "78/84"           "8"               "80"              "83"             
#> [101] "85"              "85-legacy"       "86"              "86-legacy"      
#> [105] "87"              "88"              "89"              "9"              
#> [109] "90"              "91"              "92"              "93"             
#> [113] "94"              "95"              "96"              "97"             
#> [117] "99"              "CT2"             "CT3/171"         "SL1/SL2/SL3/SLW"
#> [121] "SL4/SL5"
